evidence: name field value is 'firecrawl'; parent directory is 'firecrawl-cli'; commands/skill-gen.md L83 states 'name matches the parent directory name exactly'
description: SKILL.md name 'firecrawl' does not match parent directory 'firecrawl-cli', violating the convention documented in this plugin's own skill-gen.md format reference
suggested_fix: Change name field to 'firecrawl-cli', or rename the directory to 'firecrawl'

description: firecrawl-cli/SKILL.md references 'firecrawl-build' and 'firecrawl-workflows' skill families (L16, L224-225) that are not listed in plugin.json skills array and have no matching directories in this repo
suggested_fix: Clarify that firecrawl-build and firecrawl-workflows are separate plugins requiring separate installation, or remove the references if they do not exist as published plugins

evidence: firecrawl-cli/SKILL.md L137: 'Minimum interval is 5 minutes'; firecrawl-monitor/SKILL.md L120: 'Minimum schedule interval is 15 minutes'
description: Minimum monitor schedule interval is stated as 5 minutes in firecrawl-cli/SKILL.md and 15 minutes in firecrawl-monitor/SKILL.md; both claim to document the same API constraint
suggested_fix: Verify the correct minimum against the Firecrawl API docs and update the incorrect file; firecrawl-monitor's 15-minute claim is likely authoritative

evidence: frontmatter contains description and argument-hint but no allowed-tools field; command body uses Write, Read, Bash (firecrawl, wc, npx) without declaring them
description: Command skill-gen.md lacks allowed-tools frontmatter; the agent's permitted tool set is unconstrained
suggested_fix: Add allowed-tools: [Read, Write, Bash(firecrawl *), Bash(npx firecrawl *), Bash(wc *)] to frontmatter

evidence: Step 1 proceeds directly to 'firecrawl map $ARGUMENTS' with no guard for empty or missing argument
description: Command uses $ARGUMENTS directly in Step 1 without checking whether a URL was supplied; an empty invocation would send a blank URL to firecrawl map
suggested_fix: Add before Step 1: 'If $ARGUMENTS is empty, ask the user for the documentation URL before proceeding.'

evidence: 'production-ready' on L8 with no acceptance criteria
description: 'production-ready' is a vague quality claim without measurable acceptance criteria
suggested_fix: Replace with concrete criteria such as 'passes the Step 7 validation checks'

description: 'beneficial' is a vague qualifier; the agent cannot reliably judge what the user will find beneficial without a concrete signal
suggested_fix: Replace with: 'domain-specific details or procedural knowledge the agent cannot infer from the URL alone'

description: 'relevant pages' lacks a filter criterion; the subsequent list at L22 and L29 provides specifics but the phrase itself is vague
suggested_fix: Replace 'all relevant pages' with 'all pages matching: API reference, quickstart, core concepts, authentication, examples'

description: 'brief' has no concrete length or scope constraint
'primary' lacks a ranking signal; unclear whether this means most frequent, most complex, or user-stated
'representative sample' is undefined; the agent cannot determine what qualifies as representative across diverse script types
suggested_fix: Replace with: 'test at least one script from each distinct operation type present in the skill'

description: 'complex' is undefined; no threshold (page count, nav depth, JS interaction requirement) distinguishes complex from simple sites
suggested_fix: Replace 'complex' with a concrete criterion, e.g., 'sites requiring navigation across multiple pages or structured data spread across subpages'

description: 'concise' is redundant noise alongside the concrete '2-3 sentence' constraint

evidence: 'Convert the user's intent into a concise 2-3 sentence goal' on L145
description: 'concise' is redundant alongside the explicit '2-3 sentence' sentence-count bound
suggested_fix: Drop 'concise'; the sentence-count constraint is sufficient

evidence: 'keep the goal broad rather than guessing exclusions' on L149
description: 'broad' is a vague directive with no actionable definition; the agent cannot reliably judge what 'broad' means here
suggested_fix: Replace with: 'omit exclusions entirely' or 'use the user's phrasing verbatim without adding exclusions'
